Returns the health status of the API and its components

  parameters={undefined}

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"All components healthy","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"components":{"additionalProperties":{"properties":{"message":{"description":"optional message for unhealthy components","type":"string"},"status":{"description":"\"healthy\" or \"unhealthy\"","type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"description":"individual component health","type":"object"},"status":{"description":"overall status: \"healthy\" or \"degraded\"","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"503":{"description":"One or more components unhealthy","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"components":{"additionalProperties":{"properties":{"message":{"description":"optional message for unhealthy components","type":"string"},"status":{"description":"\"healthy\" or \"unhealthy\"","type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"description":"individual component health","type":"object"},"status":{"description":"overall status: \"healthy\" or \"degraded\"","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
